notes:
ci: auto-release desktop MSI on push to main

Trigger release-windows workflow on pushes to main that touch desktop
build inputs instead of requiring a manual vX.Y.Z tag. Major.minor come
from desktopAppVersion; patch auto-increments from the latest tag. The
workflow creates the tag + GitHub Release itself and uses the commit
message as release notes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>
